parameters.name: ptr_init
parameters.override_behavior: sets reset pointer position in the circular element array

parameters.name: vdd
parameters.override_behavior: sets output high level and twice the clock threshold

modeling_constraints: Keep both public source files and both public module interfaces; the helper-to-encoder connection is part of the system binding.
Use voltage contributions and event-driven sampled state only.
Do not use current contributions, ddt(), idt(), debug strobes, pass/fail ports, or simulator-specific side channels.
problem_statement: the supplied system violates the public contract

properties.observable_contract: On each rising helper clock crossing, vin rounds to the nearest integer and clamps to a four-bit code from 0 through 15.
A sampled active-low reset initializes ptr to the one-hot ptr_init position.
Each post-reset rising edge advances the circular pointer by the sampled unsigned code modulo 16.
Ptr remains exactly one-hot at the updated circular pointer position.
Cell_en implements the public rotating span and LSB boundary-cell rule for the sampled code, including the code-zero boundary-cell case.
The four helper outputs feed the DWA code bus in MSB-to-LSB order without bit reversal.

title: DWA DEM Encoder
